title: MythicTotem
description: Create your own BOSS totems! - Support unlimited size 3D totems!
body:
[![Discord Support](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ManyouTeam/MythicTotem/refs/heads/master/show/discord-support-button1.png)](https://discord.gg/RZajEybhBw) [![Plugin Docs](https://github.com/ManyouTeam/MythicTotem/blob/master/show/plugin-doc-button.png?raw=true)](http://mythictotem.superiormc.cn/) ![Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ManyouTeam/MythicTotem/refs/heads/master/show/banner.png)
# **MythicTotem** *Create your own custom summoning totems and bonus effects totem for Minecraft servers.* MythicTotem is a powerful and highly configurable plugin that allows server owners to create custom **totem-based summoning and bonus effect systems**. Inspired by vanilla Minecraft mechanics like the Wither structure, MythicTotem lets players activate bosses, rewards, effects, commands, or custom workflows by building specific block structures in the world. Instead of being limited to fixed shapes or hardcoded behavior, MythicTotem gives you full control over **totem layouts**, **activation triggers**, **conditions**, **prices**, and **actions**.
![Totem Spawn](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ManyouTeam/MythicTotem/refs/heads/master/show/Totem%20spawn.gif) ![Area Bonus Effect](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ManyouTeam/MythicTotem/refs/heads/master/show/Area%20bonus%20effect.gif) ![Upgrade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ManyouTeam/MythicTotem/refs/heads/master/show/Upgrade.gif)
## **Features** ### **Custom Totem Structure System** * Create your own custom totem layouts through configuration * Supports both 2D and 3D totem structures * No fixed shape limits — build simple or complex summoning structures * Supports vertical and horizontal detection modes * Core block system for more accurate activation control ### **Multiple Activation Triggers** * **BlockPlaceEvent**: Activate totems when players place blocks * **PlayerInteractEvent**: Activate totems by clicking structures * **PlayerDropItemEvent**: Trigger checks when players drop items * **EntityPlaceEvent**: Supports entity-based activation such as End Crystals * **BlockRedstoneEvent**: Build redstone-powered activation systems * **BlockPistonEvent**: Advanced piston-driven activation support ### **Powerful Action & Condition System** * Run commands, messages, sounds, particles, titles, effects, teleports, and more * Use conditions to control when a totem can be activated * Supports permission checks, world checks, biome checks, placeholder checks, trigger checks, and custom logic * Build advanced summoning workflows without writing code ### **Boss Summoning & Custom Events** * Perfect for creating custom boss summoning rituals * Supports command-based boss spawning * Supports MythicMobs spawning actions * Can remove the totem structure after activation, just like vanilla summoning mechanics * Can keep the structure in the world for reusable or persistent totems ### **Bonus Effects System** * Create passive bonus totems that affect nearby players * Configurable range, particle display, limits, and active bonus amount * Supports apply actions, remove actions, and periodic circle actions * Optional GUI for viewing totem bonus information * Upgradeable bonus totems with configurable prices ### **Custom Price & Key System** * Require items or currencies before a totem can activate * Use special key items for summoning rituals * Supports flexible item matching through ItemFormat * Useful for boss keys, dungeon entries, altar sacrifices, and event tokens ### **Custom Block & Item Compatibility** * Supports vanilla Minecraft blocks * Compatible with popular custom item and custom block plugins * Supports custom block checks for plugins such as ItemsAdder, Oraxen, Nexo, CraftEngine, MMOItems, and more * Supports entity/furniture-based totem parts in advanced setups ### **Placeholder & Integration Support** * PlaceholderAPI support for dynamic text and conditions * Per-player language support * Configurable number formatting * Libreforge hook support for advanced bonus effects * Designed for modern Spigot and Paper servers
